title: High Court Bail Docket IN-BAIL-2023-0905
summary: Rekha Devi, wife of one of the co-accused in a major bank robbery case involving loot of ₹98 lakh and DVR of CCTV footage, sought anticipatory bail. While no female was seen at the time of the robbery, it was alleged that ₹48 lakh of the looted money was traced to her through a land purchase.
